message:
feat(ftui-runtime): extend scheduler evidence with aging/starvation/loss fields

Expand JobEvidence with three new fields for observability and policy
tuning:

- aging_reward: the contribution of aging_factor * age_ms to priority
- starvation_floor: the ratio * starve_boost_ratio floor when the
  starvation guard fires, else 0
- objective_loss_proxy: monotone loss proxy (1/max(priority, w_min))
  that the policy minimizes — lower is better

Also add a PriorityTerms helper struct to bundle the computation,
update the manual JSON serialization to emit the new fields, and add
a doc comment describing the equivalent minimization form.

Includes the new cost_model.rs module for cost estimation logic.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
